summary: Adds voice realtime diagnostics, replaces misleading offline voice errors, and moves voice DM/room state through shared Redis helpers when configured.
changes: Added failed voice-delivery logging with sender/target sid counts and presence diagnostics.
Changed DM voice invite/accept frontend errors to realtime-unavailable wording instead of offline wording.
Added voice ACK diagnostic payloads for not-delivered cases.
Added shared-state helpers for DM voice sessions.
Added shared-state helpers for room voice rosters.
Updated block/disconnect cleanup to delete voice sessions through shared helper functions.
Added topology guard for unsafe multi-worker voice configurations.
validation: node --check on all static JS files
